title: Purpose and roles of HRM
summary: 9609 AS — human resource management functions: planning, recruitment, training, and motivation.
learningObjectives: Define HRM and its strategic role.
Explain link between HRM and business objectives.

simpleExplanation.title: Managing people
simpleExplanation.summary: HRM aligns workforce capability with business strategy — right people, skills, and motivation at the right cost.

sections.content: **HRM** (2.1.1) opens the people unit. Cambridge tests **application** — how HR policy supports **case business objectives**.
